luxuryTrades.name: goldsmith
luxuryTrades.description: Crafted gold jewelry, ceremonial objects, reliquaries, and elite tableware.

luxuryTrades.name: silversmith
luxuryTrades.description: Produced silver vessels, church plate, utensils, and decorative luxury goods.

luxuryTrades.name: filigree worker
luxuryTrades.description: Created intricate wirework ornamentation in precious metals.

luxuryTrades.name: lapidary
luxuryTrades.description: Cut and polished gemstones and engraved hard stones.

luxuryTrades.name: enameler
luxuryTrades.description: Applied fused colored glass decoration to metal surfaces.

luxuryTrades.name: ivory carver
luxuryTrades.description: Carved luxury devotional objects, handles, and miniatures from ivory.

luxuryTrades.name: tapestry weaver
luxuryTrades.description: Produced large decorative woven wall hangings for courts and churches.

luxuryTrades.name: lace maker
luxuryTrades.description: Made intricate lace trim for elite clothing and church vestments.

luxuryTrades.name: silk weaver
luxuryTrades.description: Produced luxury silk textiles, brocades, and velvets.

luxuryTrades.name: embroiderer
luxuryTrades.description: Decorated garments and banners with stitched imagery and gold thread.

luxuryTrades.name: passementerie maker
luxuryTrades.description: Produced tassels, braid, trim, and decorative cords.

luxuryTrades.name: velvet weaver
luxuryTrades.description: Specialized in dense luxury velvet cloth.

luxuryTrades.name: damask weaver
luxuryTrades.description: Created patterned woven textiles with reversible designs.

luxuryTrades.name: furrier
luxuryTrades.description: Prepared and sold luxury fur garments and linings.

luxuryTrades.name: illuminator
luxuryTrades.description: Decorated manuscripts with gold leaf and painted ornament.

luxuryTrades.name: bookbinder
luxuryTrades.description: Bound manuscripts and books in leather, wood, and metal fittings.

luxuryTrades.name: mirror maker
luxuryTrades.description: Produced polished and silvered mirrors, especially luxury Venetian styles.

luxuryTrades.name: glassblower
luxuryTrades.description: Made vessels, beads, windows, and decorative glass.

luxuryTrades.name: stained glass maker
luxuryTrades.description: Created colored glass windows for churches and civic buildings.

luxuryTrades.name: maiolica painter
luxuryTrades.description: Painted tin-glazed ceramic luxury ware.

luxuryTrades.name: cabinetmaker
luxuryTrades.description: Built fine furniture with carving and inlay.

luxuryTrades.name: intarsia specialist
luxuryTrades.description: Created illusionistic wood inlay decoration.

luxuryTrades.name: organ builder
luxuryTrades.description: Constructed pipe organs for churches and courts.

luxuryTrades.name: clockmaker
luxuryTrades.description: Built mechanical clocks and precision timing devices.

luxuryTrades.name: astrolabe maker
luxuryTrades.description: Produced astronomical navigation instruments.

luxuryTrades.name: lens grinder
luxuryTrades.description: Ground optical lenses for spectacles and scientific devices.

luxuryTrades.name: armor decorator
luxuryTrades.description: Etched, gilded, and ornamented ceremonial armor.

luxuryTrades.name: sword polisher
luxuryTrades.description: Finished and polished high-status blades.

luxuryTrades.name: damascener
luxuryTrades.description: Inlaid precious metals into weapon surfaces.

luxuryTrades.name: seal engraver
luxuryTrades.description: Carved official seals and signet rings.

luxuryTrades.name: perfumer
luxuryTrades.description: Blended fragrances, oils, and aromatic waters.

luxuryTrades.name: apothecary
luxuryTrades.description: Prepared medicines, pigments, spices, and luxury compounds.

luxuryTrades.name: mapmaker
luxuryTrades.description: Created navigational charts and decorative maps.

luxuryTrades.name: miniature painter
luxuryTrades.description: Painted small detailed portraits and devotional images.

luxuryTrades.name: mosaicist
luxuryTrades.description: Assembled decorative mosaics from colored stone and glass.

luxuryTrades.name: bronze caster
luxuryTrades.description: Cast statues, bells, doors, and decorative metalworks.

luxuryTrades.name: bell founder
luxuryTrades.description: Specialized in casting church and civic bells.

luxuryTrades.name: parade armor maker
luxuryTrades.description: Built ceremonial armor for nobility and courts.

luxuryTrades.name: court tailor
luxuryTrades.description: Tailored elite garments for nobles and royalty.

ordinaryTrades.name: bowyer
ordinaryTrades.description: Made bows for hunting and warfare.

ordinaryTrades.name: fletcher
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced arrows and bolts with feather fletching.

ordinaryTrades.name: blacksmith
ordinaryTrades.description: Forged tools, nails, hinges, and general ironwork.

ordinaryTrades.name: farrier
ordinaryTrades.description: Shoed horses and treated hoof problems.

ordinaryTrades.name: cooper
ordinaryTrades.description: Made barrels, casks, and wooden containers.

ordinaryTrades.name: wheelwright
ordinaryTrades.description: Constructed wagon and cart wheels.

ordinaryTrades.name: carpenter
ordinaryTrades.description: Built wooden structures, roofs, and interiors.

ordinaryTrades.name: mason
ordinaryTrades.description: Worked stone for buildings, walls, and foundations.

ordinaryTrades.name: brickmaker
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced fired clay bricks for construction.

ordinaryTrades.name: potter
ordinaryTrades.description: Made household pottery and storage vessels.

ordinaryTrades.name: baker
ordinaryTrades.description: Baked bread and pastries for local communities.

ordinaryTrades.name: brewer
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced beer and ale for daily consumption.

ordinaryTrades.name: miller
ordinaryTrades.description: Ground grain into flour using mills.

ordinaryTrades.name: butcher
ordinaryTrades.description: Prepared and sold meat products.

ordinaryTrades.name: fishmonger
ordinaryTrades.description: Sold fresh and preserved fish.

ordinaryTrades.name: candlemaker
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced wax and tallow candles.

ordinaryTrades.name: tanner
ordinaryTrades.description: Processed animal hides into leather.

ordinaryTrades.name: cobbler
ordinaryTrades.description: Repaired and sometimes made shoes.

ordinaryTrades.name: cordwainer
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced new leather shoes from fine leather.

ordinaryTrades.name: glovemaker
ordinaryTrades.description: Crafted leather and cloth gloves.

ordinaryTrades.name: rope maker
ordinaryTrades.description: Twisted fibers into rope and cordage.

ordinaryTrades.name: net maker
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced fishing and cargo nets.

ordinaryTrades.name: weaver
ordinaryTrades.description: Wove cloth from wool, linen, or hemp.

ordinaryTrades.name: dyer
ordinaryTrades.description: Colored textiles using natural dyes.

ordinaryTrades.name: fuller
ordinaryTrades.description: Cleaned and thickened wool cloth.

ordinaryTrades.name: tailor
ordinaryTrades.description: Cut and sewed clothing to fit customers.

ordinaryTrades.name: hatter
ordinaryTrades.description: Made hats and headwear from felt and cloth.

ordinaryTrades.name: soapmaker
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced soap from fats and lye.

ordinaryTrades.name: parchment maker
ordinaryTrades.description: Prepared animal skins for writing surfaces.

ordinaryTrades.name: scribe
ordinaryTrades.description: Copied legal, religious, and commercial texts by hand.

ordinaryTrades.name: printer
ordinaryTrades.description: Operated presses to produce books and pamphlets.

ordinaryTrades.name: type founder
ordinaryTrades.description: Cast movable type for printing presses.

ordinaryTrades.name: locksmith
ordinaryTrades.description: Built locks, keys, and security hardware.

ordinaryTrades.name: nail maker
ordinaryTrades.description: Forged nails for construction and shipbuilding.

ordinaryTrades.name: shipwright
ordinaryTrades.description: Constructed ships and large boats.

ordinaryTrades.name: sailmaker
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced sails and rigging cloth.

ordinaryTrades.name: cartwright
ordinaryTrades.description: Built carts and wagons for transport.

ordinaryTrades.name: tile maker
ordinaryTrades.description: Produced roofing and flooring tiles.

ordinaryTrades.name: plasterer
ordinaryTrades.description: Applied plaster finishes to walls and ceilings.

ordinaryTrades.name: chimney sweep
ordinaryTrades.description: Cleaned soot from chimneys and hearths.
